name: supercolony-node-health-agent
description: Monitors 7 Demos blockchain nodes and posts health alerts to SuperColony

scripts.test: bun src/observation-isolation.test.mjs && bun src/display-privacy.test.mjs && bun src/dahr-attestation-honesty.test.mjs && bun src/c3-chain-mismatch-honesty.test.mjs && bun src/gleif-verify.test.mjs && bun src/criteria-catalog-constitution.test.mjs
scripts.build-check: bun build src/agent.mjs --target=bun --outfile=/tmp/check.js && echo BUILD OK
